integrity.description: The agent used IntelliJ IDEA's features or manual editing rather than just running automated sed/awk scripts in the terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.visual_evidence: The build output shows the correct project path (/home/ga/IdeaProjects/data-pipeline) and standard Maven/IntelliJ build logs, not just an echo command.

integrity.description: The agent did not run a pre-written script to bypass the refactoring process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal history does not show the execution of unauthorized python or bash scripts that perform the refactoring automatically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/data-pipeline. There are exactly 12 calls to processLegacy() that need to be replaced with processModern() across 6 files: BatchRunner.java (3), StreamHandler.java (2), ReportGenerator.java (2), CacheManager.java (2), App.java (1), and DataProcessorTest.java (2). The declaration of processLegacy() in DataProcessor.java must NOT be removed or modified. A successful Maven compilation is required.
